headlines.title: New York City-bound flight from Kenya diverted over malfunctioning flight controls
headlines.description: The Kenya Airways flight turned back to its departure airport, Jomo Kenyatta International in the capital city, Nairobi, with no other issues reported.

headlines.title: Firework strikes Delta flight landing at Chicago’s Midway Airport
headlines.description: The aircraft landed safely and taxied to the gate, the airline said, adding that the incident is under review.

headlines.title: On Uber and Lyft, different prices for the same ride raise questions about fares
headlines.description: A Consumer Reports investigation finds Uber and Lyft riders often see different prices even when they request rides at the same time on the same route.

headlines.title: Former Air Canada pilot flew hundreds of flights without proper license, police say
headlines.description: A former pilot flew commercial planes for nearly 17 years without the required license, Ontario police said.

headlines.title: Auburn student found dead in Japan often took ‘decompression’ hikes, friend says
headlines.description: James “Weston” Higginbotham’s body was found in a mountainous area outside of Kyoto after he’d been missing for about a week.

headlines.title: FAA probes close call between JetBlue plane and aircraft near Fort Lauderdale Airport
headlines.description: The JetBlue plane received an onboard alert warning about another nearby aircraft that was “not in communications with air traffic control,” according to the FAA.

headlines.title: Judge declines to jail teenager accused of killing stepsister aboard cruise ship
headlines.description: A federal judge declined to jail a Florida teenager accused of killing and sexually assaulting his stepsister, allowing him to remain in the custody of a family member while he awaits trial.

headlines.title: New York faces chaotic Monday commute with Long Island Rail Road strike
headlines.description: New York officials urged commuters to work from home Monday as a strike by Long Island Rail Road workers disrupted commutes for hundreds of thousands of riders across the region.Gov.

headlines.title: Plane crashes off the east coast of Florida, leading to dramatic sea rescue of 11
headlines.description: Eleven people survived a plane crash at sea and then spent five harrowing hours in a raft before they were plucked to safety in a “miraculous” rescue, officials said Wednesday

headlines.title: Video shows passenger jet fatally strike person on Denver airport runway
headlines.description: Video released Sunday by airport officials shows the moment a Frontier passenger jet struck a person on a Denver International Airport runway.

headlines.title: ‘Get in loser, we’re buying Spirit’: One man’s viral plan to revive the airline
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines was the budget-friendly carrier America loved to hate.

headlines.title: Spain says it will harbor cruise ship at center of suspected hantavirus outbreak in its Canary Islands
headlines.description: The government of Spain said Tuesday that it will receive the cruise ship at the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak at one of its ports in the Canary Islands
